message:
fix(codegen): improve native specialization opcode validation

- Add isNativeSupportedOpcode() to validate all opcodes before enabling
  native specialization (prevents incomplete code generation)
- Limit native specialization to functions with <=2 arguments
  (multi-array functions like convolveRGBA can't use single-array path)
- Add support for loc8 variants and push_4-7 constants
- Add add_loc opcode support for native codegen

This prevents runtime errors from incomplete native code generation
while preserving zero-FFI optimization for simple array functions.
